chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No. D- 836 of 2016 Before:- Mr. Justice Nadeem Akhtar Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Petitioner: Nemo for the petitioner. Respondents: Through Mr. Muhammad Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. Advocate General Sindh. Date of hearing & decision: 03.12.2019 O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J: - Petitioner in the captioned petition is seeking appointment on ministerial post on son quota in Education Department, Government of Sindh, in terms of Rule 11-A of Sindh Civil Servant (Appointment Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974. Learned A.A.G. has pointed out that the case of the petitioner is based on son quota and there is no provision under the law to accommodate him on son quota basis. We agree with the contention of learned A.A.G. on the aforesaid proposition that under Rule 11-A of Sindh Civil Servant (Appointment Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974 there exists no provision to appoint a son / daughter of a retired employee of Government of Sindh. This being the legal position of the case, this petition is therefore, dismissed with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
